parameter.description: Optimization parameter:0: Oil Contractor Pre Tax, 1: Gas Contractor Pre Tax, 2: Oil FTP Portion, 3: Gas FTP Portion, 4: Oil IC, 5: Gas IC, 6: Oil DMO Fee, 7: Gas DMO Fee, 8: VAT Rate, 9: Effective Tax Rate, 10: Ministerial Discretion, 11: Accelerated Depreciation, 12: VAT Discount, 13: LBT Discount
